name: Apple Pancakes (German)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, 2 teaspoons sugar, and salt.
2. Beat the eggs and milk together in a bowl.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the egg mixture, stirring until smooth.
4. In a separate pan, sauté apple slices in 1/4 cup butter until tender.
5. Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon together.
6. Toss the apples with the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
7. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a deep-fry pan (about 6 inches in diameter).
8. Pour the batter into the hot oil, forming pancakes about 1/4 inch thick.
9. Place about 1/4 of the apple mixture on top of each pancake and cover with more batter.
10. Fry until lightly browned on both sides. Keep warm.
11. Repeat steps 7-10 until all the batter and apples are used up.
I hope you enjoy making these Apple Pancakes (German)!
